Implement Claude process stdout/stderr capture with log file + ring buffer
description: Implement output capture: pipe stdout through a scanner, write each line to log file (in worktree dir) AND append to ring buffer. Ring buffer is a fixed-size circular buffer of 1000 OutputLine entries. Subscribers get notified via channel broadcast. Log file path: <worktreePath>/.boss/claude.log.
close_reason: Already implemented in runner.go as part of bossanova-r16 — captureOutput, ringBuffer, subscribers, and log file all done.

description: Implement Create: generate branch name from session title (boss/<sanitized-title>), run git worktree add <worktreeBaseDir>/<branchName> -b <branchName> <baseBranch>, then execute setup script if present with 5-minute context timeout. Return worktree path and branch name.

title: Add boss bin entry to package.json and verify npx boss works
Implement home screen view with session table, state colors, and 2s polling
description: Home screen shows active sessions in a table (ID, title, state, branch, PR#, checks). Color-coded states: green (merged/green_draft/ready_for_review), yellow (implementing/awaiting_checks), red (fixing/blocked), cyan (creating/starting/pushing/opening), gray (closed). 2-second polling via tea.Tick. Keyboard nav: arrows to select session, enter to attach, n for new, r for repos, q to quit. Action bar at bottom.

Shows ended banner on SessionEnded. Ctrl+C detaches (cancels stream context, returns to home). Uses Bubbletea viewport bubble for scrollable output.

Implement Archive, Resurrect, EmptyTrash, and DetectOriginURL
description: Archive: git worktree remove <path> (keep branch alive). Resurrect: git worktree add <path> <existing-branch>, run setup script with 5m timeout. EmptyTrash: for each archived session, git push origin --delete <branch>, git worktree prune. DetectOriginURL: parse origin remote URL from git config in repo path.

description: Create services/bossd/internal/session/lifecycle.go with SessionLifecycle struct. Constructor takes SessionStore, WorktreeManager, ClaudeRunner, zerolog.Logger. Methods: StartSession(ctx, sessionID) - creates worktree, starts claude, fires state machine events. StopSession - stops claude process. ArchiveSession - stops claude, removes worktree. ResurrectSession - creates worktree from existing branch, starts claude.

title: Implement archive, resurrect, and trash commands
description: boss archive <id> — calls ArchiveSession RPC. boss resurrect <id> — calls ResurrectSession RPC. boss trash empty [--older-than 30d] — calls EmptyTrash RPC with optional duration filter. All are non-interactive, print result to stdout.

Send existing ring buffer contents as initial burst, then stream new lines as they arrive. Send StateChange events when session state changes. Send SessionEnded when process exits. Respect context cancellation (client disconnect).
